title: Tanuki and the Gentle River
subtitle: A quiet river story to help your body slow down.

steps.text: Imagine Tanuki walking along a soft forest path toward a gentle river.
steps.hint: The air feels cool and peaceful.

steps.text: Tanuki sits by the water and watches tiny ripples move across the surface.
steps.hint: Each ripple is slow and calm.

steps.text: A leaf lands on the river and floats quietly downstream.
steps.hint: Take a slow breath in… and out… as you watch it drift.

steps.text: Tanuki closes their eyes and listens to the soft river sounds.
steps.hint: Let your body feel as calm as the drifting leaf.
